original_final_question: Which county seat corresponds to the New York county that recorded more violent crimes in 2021 when comparing Erie County and Westchester County? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Compare 2021 violent crime totals for Erie County and Westchester County and identify the county with the higher value.
2. Look up the county seat of that county and return only the city name.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: 2021 violent crimes -> Erie County (3,493) vs Westchester County (1,520) -> Erie County
HOP 2 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 2 depends on node 1):
Node 2: Buffalo is the county seat of Erie County -> Buffalo
